heading.description: Input, process, or output stage heading.

description.example: The input stage gathers the information needed before the process begins.

icon_name.description: Required Remix Icon class because the BlockSpec requires icons.

items.heading: Input

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Current BlockSpec item range is exactly 3.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
